spec.name: python_exec
spec.description: Execute a Python 3 code string and return its stdout. Used for zlib compression and hex encoding.

code.description: Python source code to execute. Print results to stdout.

spec.implementation_notes: exec the provided 'code' string in a fresh namespace, capturing stdout. The ONLY accepted parameter is 'code' (a string) — do not require input_path or any other parameter. Standard library (zlib, binascii) must be importable.

request.rationale: zlib compression is deterministic binary work that cannot be performed reliably by hand; no existing tool offers code execution. The prior python_exec failed because its implementation required an 'input_path' param not in the schema — this spec fixes that by accepting only 'code'.
